welcome_overlay.title: Welcome to Your AI Assistant!
welcome_overlay.subtitle: Get started in just a few minutes — connect WhatsApp, configure your AI, and start automating conversations.
welcome_overlay.description: Your AI assistant will handle customer conversations, qualify leads, and provide 24/7 support automatically.

step1.title: Create WhatsApp Instance
step1.description: First, let's create a new WhatsApp instance for your AI agent.
step1.phone_hint: Optional. You can add this later after connecting.

step2.title: Connect WhatsApp
step2.description: Scan the QR code with your WhatsApp app to connect this instance.
step2.no_instance: No instance available. Please go back to Step 1.
step2.step3: Tap "Link a Device" and scan the QR code

step3.title: Configure Your AI Agent
step3.description: Set up your agent's personality and behavior.
step3.agent_name_required: Please enter an agent name before completing setup.
step3.prompt_hint: This prompt will be automatically generated based on your selections.

step4.title: Knowledge Base (Optional)
step4.description: Upload documents to train your AI agent. You can skip this and add knowledge later.
step4.drop_files: Drop files here or click to upload
step4.info_description: Your AI agent will use these documents to provide accurate, context-aware responses. You can add more documents later from the agent settings.
